strategy.name: DII-Supported Sector Rotation Swing-Positional
strategy.description: Focus on top 5 relative-strength sectors where DII/MF absorption offsets FII selling. Enter on trend pullbacks with defined stops; overweight earnings-confirmed leaders with institutional footprints.
